notes: Slot 3 (dataTable, location-scoped; Pierre: individually checkable). Rows are the Gold Skulltulas + Heart Pieces whose source location maps to this spine location, drawn from the gold-skulltulas / heart-pieces datasets. The 47 raw data-location strings were normalized onto the 34 spine locations (e.g. Graveyard / Kakariko Graveyard / Kakariko Village – Graveyard all fold into graveyard; Market / Guard House / Back Alley / Hyrule Castle Market into castle-town-market; Kakariko Well (past) into bottom-of-the-well). Skulltulas also feed the global tally counter; heart pieces are also in the global Heart Pieces checklist.
